series_metadata.series_description: Records of procedures for data entry, the operation of computer equipment, production control, tape library, system backup, and other aspects of a data processing operation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 1 year after superseded, obsolete, or replaced, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 1 year after superseded, obsolete, or replaced, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
